column1: if user is admin, then user -> database -> material -> user — user can access all materials
if user is not admin, then user -> database -> material -> user — user can only access own materials
if user is not registered: applicazione -> utente -> applicazione -> database -> utente -> applicazione -> database
if user is not registered, applicazione asks if user wants to register
if user agrees, applicazione registers user
componenti funzionanti? — if component is functioning, then si, ricavo impatto sostituzione componente; otherwise, no
